text.title: Feature-Gap Matrix
text.summary: Feature inventory across top 5 competitors, gap classification, and validation requirements before declaring a whitespace.

rule.statement: Snapshot competitor sites before running the feature matrix. The data layer must be reproducible 6 months later — a matrix built from live pages has no baseline to diff against.
rule.rationale: Competitors ship weekly. A feature-matrix assertion from memory or a live page is immediately stale and cannot be audited. Dated snapshots enable the quarterly diff that surfaces actual movement.

list.item: Table stakes (Y at all top-5 competitors): required to compete; building these is cost of entry, not differentiation
Opportunity (Y at 1-2 competitors, N or P at others): candidate for differentiation — validate demand before building
Validate demand (N at all competitors): may be a gap or may be intentional — check reviews for evidence of demand before claiming whitespace

rule.statement: Cite at least 5 corroborating reviews or forum posts for every gap declared as an "opportunity." A gap without demand evidence is a hypothesis, not a finding.
rule.rationale: Feature gaps can be intentional (too hard, not profitable, out of scope for the target segment) or unintentional. Review evidence distinguishes between the two and validates that customers actually want the missing feature.

list.item: Check G2, Capterra, and Reddit for review text mentioning the missing feature
Check competitor community forums and roadmap request boards for vote counts
Check if the gap is listed in any competitor's public roadmap (if so, it may close before you can ship)
Verify why competitors lack the feature: technical difficulty, low priority, or not aware of demand

rule.statement: A feature matrix older than 90 days is decorative — flag and re-run before using in any decision.
rule.rationale: SaaS competitors ship bi-weekly. A 90-day-old matrix has missed 6+ sprint cycles per competitor. Using it for product decisions means building toward a landscape that no longer exists.

text.reference: Feature matrix and gap validation templates
Script that freezes competitor URLs as dated markdown snapshots
